keys.page_subtitle: {brand} プラットフォーム サービス利用規約
keys.s01_p0: 本サービス利用規約（「規約」）は、シンガポール法人 iPrego Pte. Ltd. が提供する {brand} プラットフォームおよび関連サービスへのアクセスおよび利用を規定します。
keys.s01_p1: {brand} プラットフォームにアクセスまたは利用することにより、本規約に拘束されることに同意したものとみなされます。
keys.s01_p2: 本規約に同意しない場合は、本サービスを利用してはなりません。
keys.s07_title: 7. 支援および自動化機能
keys.s08_title: 8. 料金およびサブスクリプション
keys.s02_p0: {brand} は、以下を含む統合ビジネスソフトウェアソリューションを提供するクラウドベースの SaaS プラットフォームです。
keys.s02_ul1_li0: エンタープライズリソースプランニング（ERP）
keys.s02_ul1_li1: 会計および財務自動化
keys.s02_ul1_li4: ビジネス分析およびレポート
keys.s02_p2: サービスは iPrego Pte. Ltd. が運営する Web アプリケーションを通じて提供されます。
keys.s03_p0: {brand} プラットフォームを利用するには、18 歳以上であり、拘束力のある契約を締結する法的能力が必要です。
keys.s03_p1: 組織を代表してサービスを利用する場合、当該組織を本規約に拘束する権限があることを確認します。
keys.s04_p0: To access certain services, users must create an account.
keys.s04_ul2_li1: maintain the confidentiality of login credentials
keys.s04_ul2_li2: notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account (contact: {support_email})
keys.s04_p3: Users are responsible for all activities conducted through their accounts.
keys.s05_p0: Users must not use the platform in a manner that:
keys.s05_ul1_li2: attempts to gain unauthorized access to systems
keys.s05_ul1_li3: disrupts the security or performance of the platform
keys.s05_p2: iPrego Pte. Ltd. reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts for misuse of the service.
keys.s06_p0: Customers retain ownership of all data uploaded to the platform.
keys.s06_p1: iPrego Pte. Ltd. acts as a data intermediary under Singapore PDPA when processing personal data on behalf of customers.
keys.s06_p2: We process such data solely for the purpose of providing the platform services.
keys.s06_p3: Customers remain responsible for ensuring their data collection and use complies with applicable laws.
keys.s07_p0: The {brand} platform may include assisted and automated features designed to support business operations.
keys.s07_ul2_li2: should not be relied upon as professional advice
keys.s07_p3: Users remain responsible for reviewing automated or suggested decisions before execution.
keys.s08_p0: Certain features of the platform require paid subscriptions.
keys.s08_p3: Subscriptions may renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date.
keys.s09_p0: iPrego Pte. Ltd. aims to provide reliable service availability.
keys.s09_p1: However, service interruptions may occur due to:
keys.s09_p3: Reasonable efforts will be made to restore service promptly.

keys.s10_p1: Users are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the platform.
keys.s10_p2: Users may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse engineer the platform without authorization.
keys.s11_p0: We may suspend or terminate access if users violate these Terms.
keys.s11_p1: Users may terminate their accounts at any time.
keys.s11_ul3_li0: access to the platform may be discontinued
keys.s11_ul3_li1: stored data may be deleted in accordance with retention policies
keys.s12_p0: To the maximum extent permitted by law, iPrego Pte. Ltd. shall not be liable for:
keys.s12_ul1_li3: loss of data caused by user actions
keys.s13_p0: These Terms are governed by the laws of Singapore.
keys.s13_p1: Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore.
